text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "PowerShell is creating numerous registry keys related to 'SystemCertificates\\Disallowed' and 'Policies\\Microsoft\\SystemCertificates\\Disallowed' in both HKLM (Local Machine) and HKU (User) hives. This activity, while potentially legitimate for system administration or policy enforcement, is security-sensitive as it involves manipulating certificate trust stores and can be abused by attackers to bypass security controls or establish persistence.",
  "indicators": [
    "powershell.exe",
    "reg_create",
    "SystemCertificates",
    "Disallowed",
    "Policies",
    "Certificates",
    "CRLs",
    "CTLs",
    "HKLM",
    "HKU"
  ]
}
